securitySubtitle: How your data is handled - and how to verify it independently.

securityData.label: Processing location
securityData.value: All analysis runs inside your browser via DuckDB-Wasm — a full SQL engine compiled to WebAssembly. No backend API for data.

securityData.label: File upload to server
securityData.value: Files are read by the browser File API and passed directly to the WASM engine in memory. No file is transmitted.

securityData.label: Column names / schema
securityData.value: Schema is inferred locally inside DuckDB-Wasm.

securityData.label: Query results / row data
securityData.value: Results stay in browser memory until the tab is closed.

securityData.label: Data retention
securityData.value: No data is persisted. Closing the tab wipes everything. No localStorage, no IndexedDB.

securityNetwork.label: Page load
securityNetwork.value: JS, CSS, WASM engine binary served from Vercel Edge. Standard CDN delivery, no user data.

securityNetwork.label: Authentication (Clerk)
securityNetwork.value: Clerk handles authentication for account features. Does not receive any file data, column names, or query results.

securityNetwork.label: After file upload
securityNetwork.value: Once a file is loaded, all processing is local. No outbound requests carry user data. Works offline.

securityNetwork.label: Analytics / tracking
securityNetwork.value: No page-view tracking, no cookies, no fingerprinting on data tool pages.

securityGdpr.label: Personal data server-side
securityGdpr.value: File contents never reach a server.

securityGdpr.label: Data Processing Agreement
securityGdpr.value: No personal data is processed by StackMe. May apply to Clerk (auth) if your organisation requires DPAs with all sub-processors.

securityGdpr.label: Cookies
securityGdpr.value: Clerk sets a session cookie for authenticated users only. No tracking cookies.

securityGdpr.label: Right to erasure (GDPR Art. 17)
securityGdpr.value: We hold no user data to delete.

securityVerifyIntro: Any reviewer can verify the zero-data-egress claim without trusting this document:
securityVerifySteps: Press F12 → DevTools → Network tab → clear the log
Drop any CSV or JSON file onto the upload zone
Observe: zero outbound requests containing file contents, column names, or data values
